title: Non-appearance of Parties. The non-appearance of the requesting party
content: 5 for two (2) consecutive settings for mandatory conciliation, despite due notice thereof, 6 shall be a ground for the termination of the Request for Assistance for lack of interest. 7 8 In case of non-appearance by the responding party for two (2) consecutive settings for 9 mandatory conciliation, the Conciliator shall immediately terminate the proceedings and 10 refer the Request for Assistance to the appropriate office for action. 11 12

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
